sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (DEPTLEVEL = 1 OR CN = 'Top') ) A

SELECT COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, WORKSTARTTIME, WORKENDTIME, CLOSEDDAY, ATTITUDEMODAPPL, CLOSEDDATEATTITUDE, date_format(CONFSETDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CONFSETDATE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET WORKSTARTTIME = #workStartTime#, WORKENDTIME = #workEndTime#, CLOSEDDAY = #closedDay#, ATTITUDEMODAPPL = #attitudeModAppl#, CLOSEDDATEATTITUDE = #closedDateAttitude#, CONFSETDATE = str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
